Compliance.description: No regulatory violations, fines, or licensing issues found with FSCA/CMS/POPIA/food authorities; legal Pty Ltd operation with pharmacy/med aid features.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter strong at 4.3/5 (164 reviews, 76% 5-star for speed/convenience); apps weaker 3.4/5 Google (1.4K), ~4.1/5 iOS with complaints on updates/delays.

Product Value.description: Supermarket pricing good value but high/variable delivery fees/surge reduce affordability especially small orders.

Innovation.description: Pioneer fast delivery (15-30min), dark stores, real-time med aid claims/pharma scripts, built Checkers Sixty60 platform; extensive app features.

Customer Support.description: Responsive 100% on HelloPeter (9h avg), app chat/ratings, email/phone (+27 10 500 0672), active on X; mixed effectiveness on refunds.

Accessibility & Security.description: App collects financial/location/contact data with encryption in transit; assumed POPIA compliance, no breaches found; limited accessibility info.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Delivery R35-R60 + surge; free over R350-R450; supermarket prices; promotions e.g. free certain hours

socialSentiment.summary: Mixed: promotions positive, complaints on items/support; responsive on X/HelloPeter; no major backlash.
